title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF KAYAN, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, TO TADIAN MUNICIPALITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 147 / 55 OG No. 16, 2860 (April 20, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2101, March 28, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF KAYAN, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, TO TADIAN MUNICIPALITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Kayan in the Mountain Province is changed to Municipality of Tadian.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, March 28, 1959.
